title: Vikram
themes: revenge, organized crime, underworld, identity
summary: A retired special agent investigates a series of murders committed by a masked vigilante group. The story unfolds in a non-linear narrative revealing deep connections between the characters. Known for its stylish action, strong villain, and universe building.

title: Kaithi
themes: father-daughter bond, survival, police vs drug mafia
summary: A newly released prisoner tries to meet his daughter for the first time while unknowingly getting entangled in a massive drug bust operation. A single night thriller with no songs and non-stop tension throughout.

title: Enthiran
themes: artificial intelligence, love, ethics of robotics, identity
summary: A scientist creates a humanoid robot with advanced intelligence and emotions. The robot falls in love with the scientist's girlfriend leading to chaos. A landmark Tamil sci-fi film known for its massive scale and visual effects.

title: Pariyerum Perumal
themes: caste discrimination, love, justice, identity, dignity
summary: A first-generation law student from a marginalized community faces caste-based discrimination as he pursues his education and falls in love. A deeply moving film that portrays the harsh social realities of Tamil Nadu with sensitivity.

themes: lost love, memories, school days, longing, moving on
summary: Two former school sweethearts reunite after decades apart during a school reunion trip. The film is a quiet and deeply emotional exploration of memories, what-ifs, and the love that never quite went away. Celebrated for its BGM and performances.

title: Master
themes: alcoholism, juvenile crime, redemption, good vs evil
summary: A college professor with a drinking problem is sent to a juvenile facility run by a ruthless gangster. A commercial action entertainer that pits two of Tamil cinema's biggest stars against each other.

title: Jai Bhim
themes: caste injustice, human rights, police brutality, tribal rights
summary: Based on a true story, a lawyer fights for justice when a tribal man dies in police custody and his wife seeks the truth. One of the most acclaimed Tamil films for its unflinching portrayal of systemic injustice.

title: Soorarai Pottru
themes: ambition, class struggle, aviation dreams, perseverance
summary: Inspired by the life of Air Deccan founder G.R. Gopinath, a man from humble origins dreams of making air travel accessible to the common man and fights against all odds to build a low-cost airline.

title: Visaranai
themes: police brutality, helplessness, migrants, systemic oppression
summary: Four Tamil migrant workers in Andhra Pradesh are falsely implicated in a robbery and subjected to brutal police torture. A harrowing and unflinching look at custodial violence and the powerlessness of the marginalized.

title: Asuran
themes: caste violence, survival, father-son bond, land rights
summary: A lower-caste farmer goes on the run with his son after a caste-related killing. Told through parallel timelines, the film reveals a father's buried violent past and his desperate attempt to protect his family.

title: Karnan
themes: caste oppression, community pride, resistance, dignity
summary: In a village denied basic rights and oppressed by the police and upper castes, a fierce young man rises to protect his people. A mythological allegory set in rural Tamil Nadu with powerful imagery and a thunderous performance by Dhanush.

title: Vada Chennai
themes: gang wars, poverty, politics, north Chennai underworld
summary: The first part of an epic crime saga set in the slums of North Chennai, following a carrom player who gets drawn into gang rivalries and political power struggles spanning decades. A rich tapestry of characters and conflict.

title: Ratsasan
themes: serial killer, obsession, detective work, psychology
summary: An aspiring filmmaker turned police officer hunts a sadistic serial killer who targets young girls. Widely praised as one of the best Tamil thrillers ever made, with a chilling antagonist and tight screenplay.

title: Mandela
themes: democracy, caste politics, identity, voting rights
summary: A barber of unknown caste becomes the deciding vote in a close local election, making him the most sought-after man in the village. A sharp political satire wrapped in gentle comedy.

title: Super Deluxe
themes: identity, karma, morality, sexuality, redemption
summary: Four seemingly unrelated stories collide in unexpected ways over a single night, exploring themes of sin, identity, and consequence. A bold, genre-defying Tamil film that challenges conventional storytelling.

title: Mersal
themes: medical corruption, revenge, twin identity, justice
summary: A man seeks revenge against a corrupt doctor who wronged his family, using the identity of a twin brother who is a magician. A masala entertainer with strong commercial elements and social commentary on healthcare.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
themes: kingship, betrayal, war, identity, duty
summary: A young man raised in a waterfall village discovers his royal lineage and sets out to free a kingdom from a tyrannical ruler. A landmark Indian film known for its unprecedented scale and visual grandeur.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
themes: betrayal, love, war, honor, sacrifice
summary: The second part reveals the truth behind the death of Baahubali and his son's quest for revenge against the treacherous Bhallaladeva. The highest-grossing Indian film at its time of release.

themes: technology vs nature, radiation, cell phone dangers, rebirth
summary: The sequel to Enthiran where Chitti the robot is revived to fight a mysterious fifth force that is using mobile phones as weapons. A visual spectacle with a strong environmental message.

title: Vinnaithaandi Varuvaayaa
themes: interreligious love, persistence, heartbreak, dreams
summary: A young filmmaker falls deeply in love with a Christian girl whose strict family opposes the relationship. A landmark Tamil romance celebrated for its music, cinematography, and emotional authenticity.

title: Anjaan
themes: gangster life, brotherhood, Mumbai underworld, redemption
summary: A gangster living it up in Mumbai discovers he has a twin brother who is an honest man. A commercial action film with slick visuals and Mumbai underworld backdrop.

title: Nayakan
themes: organized crime, family, loyalty, justice, Mumbai slums
summary: Inspired by The Godfather, a young boy who witnesses his father's murder grows up to become the godfather of a Mumbai slum, balancing crime and compassion. One of the greatest Tamil films ever made.

title: Mouna Ragam
themes: arranged marriage, grief, healing, love after loss
summary: A young woman still grieving her first love is forced into an arranged marriage. A classic Tamil romance that explores emotional healing and the possibility of love in unexpected circumstances.

title: Alaipayuthey
themes: young love, marriage struggles, compromise, urban life
summary: Two young people fall in love and elope, then face the real challenges of married life. Mani Ratnam's portrait of modern urban romance with an iconic A.R. Rahman soundtrack.

title: Kandukondain Kandukondain
themes: sisterhood, ambition, love, family duty, self-discovery
summary: Loosely adapted from Sense and Sensibility, two sisters from a struggling family find love and purpose in different ways. A beautifully crafted film with memorable music and performances.

title: Pithamagan
themes: isolation, friendship, crime, identity, belonging
summary: A man raised in a crematorium who has never seen the world befriends a conman and gets drawn into a life of crime. A haunting character study elevated by extraordinary performances from Vikram and Suriya.

title: Sethu
themes: obsessive love, violence, mental breakdown, redemption
summary: A rowdy college student becomes obsessively infatuated with a girl, and after a brutal assault, is left mentally challenged. A disturbing yet powerful study of passion, consequences, and unconditional love.

title: Anbe Sivam
themes: humanity, atheism, compassion, identity, friendship
summary: A self-centered advertising executive is forced to travel with a disfigured communist after a flight cancellation. Their journey together becomes a profound meditation on what it means to be human and to love.

title: Kadal
themes: good vs evil, redemption, faith, forbidden love
summary: A young man raised in a Christian school falls in love while being corrupted by an evil smuggler. A visually stunning film exploring the eternal battle between good and evil against a coastal backdrop.

title: Kaaka Muttai
themes: poverty, childhood dreams, urbanization, food
summary: Two slum brothers dream of eating pizza after seeing a pizza parlor open near their home. A deeply touching and universally relatable story about childhood, poverty, and the simple joys of life.

title: Sarpatta Parambarai
themes: boxing, caste pride, addiction, community honor, masculinity
summary: Set in 1970s North Chennai, a young boxer rises through the ranks of two rival boxing clans while battling personal demons and caste-based rivalry. A visceral sports drama rooted in cultural pride.

title: Irudhi Suttru
themes: sports, mentorship, class difference, ambition, gender
summary: A washed-up boxing coach discovers a talented young fisherwoman and trains her to compete at the national level. A raw and authentic sports drama about ambition, sacrifice, and the bond between a mentor and protégé.

title: Mugamoodi
themes: martial arts, vigilante justice, identity, heroism
summary: A Bruce Lee obsessed young man becomes a real-life masked vigilante to fight crime. A Tamil superhero film with impressive action choreography and a charming lead performance.

title: 7aum Arivu
themes: ancient Tamil heritage, genetic memory, bioterrorism, pride
summary: A geneticist discovers that a circus performer is the descendant of a legendary Bodhidharma and must awaken his dormant abilities to stop a Chinese bioterrorism plot. A patriotic sci-fi thriller celebrating Tamil history.

title: Annaatthe
themes: sibling bond, village life, brotherhood, protection
summary: A beloved village man will go to any lengths to protect his sister. A commercial entertainer driven by Rajinikanth's star power and centred on the sacred bond between siblings.

title: Thani Oruvan
themes: corruption, pharmaceutical crime, detective vs villain, justice
summary: A dedicated police officer goes after a brilliant villain who is orchestrating a massive pharmaceutical scam. Known for its sharp writing, intelligent antagonist, and compelling cat-and-mouse dynamic.

title: Dasavathaaram
themes: chaos theory, bioterrorism, reincarnation, history
summary: Kamal Haasan plays ten different characters across different time periods in a story involving a deadly biological weapon. An ambitious and chaotic entertainer showcasing extraordinary makeup artistry.

title: Ko
themes: journalism, political conspiracy, courage, love
summary: A photojournalist accidentally captures a political assassination and becomes a target. A fast-paced thriller that celebrates the courage of press freedom with youthful energy and a pulsating soundtrack.

title: Mynaa
themes: young love, nature, simple life, purity
summary: Two young people fall in love against the backdrop of lush forests in the Western Ghats. A beautifully shot romance that celebrates simplicity, nature, and the purity of first love.

title: Kumki
themes: human-elephant bond, tribal community, love, sacrifice
summary: A mahout and his beloved elephant are hired to capture a rogue elephant terrorizing a tribal village, where he falls in love with a local girl. A heartwarming adventure celebrating nature and the bond between man and animal.

title: Madrasapattinam
themes: colonial era, forbidden love, sacrifice, class divide
summary: A British woman revisits India as an elderly woman and recounts her love story with a fisherman's son during the 1947 independence era. A beautiful period romance with stunning production design.

title: Billa
themes: undercover mission, dual identity, drug mafia, deception
summary: A cop takes on the identity of a notorious drug lord to infiltrate a criminal organization. A stylish action remake known for Ajith's suave screen presence and slick production values.

title: Mankatha
themes: heist, betrayal, greed, morally grey characters
summary: A suspended cop orchestrates a plan to steal black money from a gambling den, but trust runs thin among the crew. A unique Tamil film with a morally grey hero and genuine unpredictability.

title: Thalapathy
themes: friendship, loyalty, crime, political power, mother-son bond
summary: Loosely inspired by the Mahabharata, a powerful gang leader and a police officer form an unlikely bond unaware of their deep family connection. A landmark film exploring loyalty, power, and tragic destiny.

title: Kadhal
themes: young love, class divide, violence, sacrifice
summary: A lower-class boy and a middle-class girl fall in love but are torn apart by her family's violent opposition. A brutally honest film about love, class, and the violence hidden beneath social respectability.

title: Sillunu Oru Kaadhal
themes: marriage, first love, family, forgiveness, trust
summary: A married couple's relationship is tested when the husband's first love reappears in their lives. A feel-good family entertainer about love, commitment, and choosing your present over your past.

title: Mozhi
themes: disability, music, love, acceptance, communication
summary: A musician falls in love with a deaf-mute woman, and their relationship blossoms through music and understanding. A beautifully sensitive romance celebrated for Jyothika's extraordinary performance.

title: Autograph
themes: past relationships, nostalgia, growing up, choices in life
summary: On the eve of his wedding, a man revisits his past relationships and the women who shaped his life. A warm and deeply human film about nostalgia, regret, and the roads not taken.

title: Thavamai Thavamirundhu
themes: father-son bond, sacrifice, family duty, aging, gratitude
summary: A father sacrifices everything for his sons who forget him in their pursuit of modern lives. A deeply emotional family drama about parental sacrifice and the pain of being forgotten by those you love most.

title: Peranbu
themes: disability, parenthood, unconditional love, sexuality
summary: A divorced father returns to care for his severely disabled daughter and discovers the depth of unconditional love. A profoundly moving film that handles its sensitive subject with remarkable grace and honesty.

title: Polladhavan
themes: crime, pursuit, street life, desperation, urban Chennai
summary: A young man's beloved bike is stolen, leading him on a desperate chase through the criminal underbelly of Chennai. Vetrimaaran's debut feature is a tense, street-level thriller with an authentic raw energy.

title: Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kaanom
themes: friendship, short-term memory loss, cricket, loyalty
summary: A man loses his short-term memory before his wedding, and his group of friends do everything to help him. A hilarious and heartwarming film that became a cult classic for its natural performances and relatable humor.

title: Soodhu Kavvum
themes: kidnapping, greed, urban crime, misfit criminals
summary: A small-time kidnapping gang with a strict code of ethics takes on more than they bargained for when politics gets involved. A darkly funny crime comedy that announced Vijay Sethupathi as a unique talent.

title: Pizza
themes: supernatural, survival horror, deception, past sins
summary: A pizza delivery boy gets trapped in a haunted mansion on a stormy night. A tight low-budget horror thriller that became a sensation for its clever twist ending and atmospheric tension.

title: Jigarthanda
themes: filmmaking, gangster life, morality, art vs reality
summary: A filmmaker wanting to make a gangster film befriends and secretly documents a real gangster. The layers of the story peel back to reveal a complex meditation on art, reality, and moral compromise.

title: Iraivi
themes: toxic masculinity, women's struggles, relationships, artistic failure
summary: Three men struggling with their failures in career and relationships slowly destroy the women in their lives. A dark and unflinching examination of patriarchy and the silent suffering of women.

title: Petta
themes: past identity, revenge, college politics, loyalty
summary: A new hostel warden at a college has a mysterious past that gradually surfaces as he confronts local villains. A love letter to Rajinikanth's classic era with vintage mass moments and style.

title: Mercury
themes: guilt, mercury poisoning, supernatural revenge, karma
summary: A group of friends on a joyride accidentally injure a mute man and leave him for dead. A completely dialogue-free horror thriller where the past haunts them in terrifying ways.

title: Nimir
themes: political idealism, rural development, comedy, community
summary: A man loses a bet and is forced to become a government official in a remote village, where he slowly falls in love with the community and politics. A light-hearted remake with charming performances.

title: Vikram Vedha
themes: good vs evil, moral ambiguity, storytelling, justice
summary: A tough police officer chases down a notorious gangster who challenges his black-and-white view of justice through a series of clever stories. A brilliantly constructed thriller inspired by the Vikram Betaal folklore.

title: Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru
themes: investigation, past trauma, deception, criminal psychology
summary: A retired police officer recounts the details of a case that destroyed his career to a journalist. A masterclass in minimalist thriller filmmaking that keeps you guessing until the very last scene.

title: Maanagaram
themes: urban crime, interconnected lives, survival, Chennai
summary: Multiple interconnected stories unfold over one night in Chennai's urban jungle. Lokesh Kanagaraj's debut is a tightly woven urban thriller that announced a major new directorial voice.

title: Kannaattu
themes: supernatural, grief, guilt, past sins
summary: A deaf-mute doctor investigates a mysterious epidemic in a remote village that appears to be supernatural in origin. A moody, art-house horror film with Mysskin's distinctive visual language.

title: Oppam
themes: blindness, survival, murder mystery, innocence
summary: A blind elevator operator becomes the sole witness to a murder and must use his other senses to survive and expose the killer. A brilliantly crafted suspense thriller.

title: Thegidi
themes: investigation, corporate crime, deception, young detective
summary: A young private detective unravels a complex corporate conspiracy. A smart, low-budget thriller that rewards patient viewers with a well-crafted mystery.

title: Naan Sigappu Manithan
themes: rare medical condition, survival, vengeance, family
summary: A man with a rare condition that makes him lose consciousness when he sleeps seeks revenge against criminals. A unique action thriller built around a fascinating medical premise.

title: Miruthan
themes: zombie apocalypse, survival, family, heroism
summary: Tamil Nadu's first zombie film where a cop tries to rescue his sister during a zombie outbreak. A fun commercial entertainer that brought the zombie genre to Tamil cinema.

title: Ivan Thanthiran
themes: investigative journalism, deception, love, crime
summary: A CBI officer and a journalist team up to solve a high-profile crime. A lightweight but entertaining thriller with a fun chemistry between its leads.

title: Saattai
themes: education system, teacher dedication, rural schools, youth
summary: A passionate government school teacher fights the corrupt education system to inspire his students. A heartfelt tribute to real teachers working in underfunded rural schools.

title: Taramani
themes: sexual freedom, modern relationships, trauma, urban life
summary: A modern urban love story between two free-spirited individuals confronting their past traumas and society's judgments. A bold and honest film about contemporary relationships and personal freedom.

title: Joker
themes: politics, corruption, protest, common man vs system
summary: A village simpleton's accidental clown persona makes him a political symbol and anti-corruption voice. A sharp political satire about the theatre of democracy and the power of the ordinary citizen.

title: Madha Gaja Raja
themes: bromance, rivalry, comedy, action
summary: Three friends get embroiled in a series of comedic misadventures. A commercial mass entertainer designed to deliver laughs and action in equal measure.

title: Tik Tik Tik
themes: space mission, asteroid threat, teamwork, heroism
summary: Tamil cinema's first space film where a thief is recruited for a classified space mission to deflect an asteroid. A fun sci-fi entertainer that broke new ground for Tamil cinema.

title: Nenjam Marappathillai
themes: obsession, past lives, supernatural love, revenge
summary: A man becomes obsessed with his employee whom he believes is the reincarnation of his murdered lover. A dark and stylish psychological horror film from one of Tamil cinema's most distinctive directors.

title: Kaatru Veliyidai
themes: toxic love, war, independence, sacrifice, longing
summary: A turbulent love story between a fighter pilot and a doctor set against the backdrop of the Kargil War and Pakistani captivity. A visually stunning exploration of passionate yet complicated love.

title: Oru Kidayin Karunai Manu
themes: human-animal bond, rural bureaucracy, compassion, humor
summary: A goat files a petition against its owner who wants to slaughter it for a wedding feast. A delightfully quirky and warm comedy that became a beloved cult film.

title: Kolamaavu Kokila
themes: drug trade, family survival, accidental crime, womanhood
summary: A timid woman accidentally becomes a key player in a drug trafficking network. A unique genre blend that uses dark humor to tell a story about survival, family, and unexpected female agency.

title: Gulebakavali
themes: magic, folklore, comedy, romance
summary: A man discovers a magical flower that can grant wishes and gets entangled in a series of comedic adventures. A fun fantasy entertainer designed for pure family entertainment.

title: Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru
themes: police investigation, criminal gang, interstate crime, dedication
summary: Based on true events, a police officer tracks a deadly gang of highway robbers and murderers across state lines. A gripping procedural thriller that celebrates the unglamorous dedication of real police work.

title: Aramm
themes: government apathy, child welfare, bureaucracy, maternal instinct
summary: A district collector races against time to save a child who has fallen into a borewell. A tense real-time thriller that doubles as a biting critique of bureaucratic failure and government apathy.

title: Merku Thodarchi Malai
themes: labor exploitation, plantation workers, poverty, dreams
summary: A young plantation worker in the Western Ghats dreams of building a better life while trapped in cycles of poverty and exploitation. A deeply compassionate and beautifully understated film.

title: Kabali
themes: Tamil diaspora, labor rights, caste, rebellion, aging gangster
summary: An aging gangster and labor rights activist in Malaysia fights for the dignity and rights of Tamil plantation workers. Pa. Ranjith uses Rajinikanth's star power to make a bold political statement.

title: Kaala
themes: slum rights, Ambedkarite politics, land struggle, Dharavi
summary: A Dharavi slum lord fights against a politician who wants to demolish the slums for a development project. A politically charged film using the Ramayana framework to comment on caste and land rights.

title: Roja
themes: nationalism, Kashmir conflict, love, sacrifice, separation
summary: A newlywed husband is captured by militants in Kashmir, and his young wife embarks on a desperate mission to secure his release. A landmark film that blended romance, patriotism, and political conflict.

title: Bombay
themes: communal riots, Hindu-Muslim love, family, tolerance
summary: A Hindu man and a Muslim woman fall in love and marry, then struggle to survive the 1993 Bombay communal riots. A powerful film about love transcending religious boundaries in times of violence.

title: Dil Se
themes: obsessive love, terrorism, northeast India, sacrifice
summary: A radio journalist falls obsessively in love with a mysterious woman who is a suicide bomber. A visually stunning and emotionally devastating film about love, loss, and political violence.

title: Mudhalvan
themes: good governance, media, political system, reform
summary: A television journalist gets a chance to be the Chief Minister for a day and ends up exposing systemic corruption. A crowd-pleasing political drama about the common man's dream of honest governance.

title: Indian
themes: corruption, patriotism, vigilante justice, generation gap
summary: An elderly freedom fighter turned vigilante assassinates corrupt government officials, while his son unknowingly investigates the killings. A landmark Tamil mass film with a powerful anti-corruption message.

title: Gentleman
themes: dual identity, crime, romance, action
summary: Shankar's directorial debut about a Robin Hood-like thief who robs the rich to give to the poor. A stylish and commercially successful action film that launched one of Tamil cinema's most important careers.

title: Ghilli
themes: escape, romance, chase, heroism
summary: A carefree young man helps a woman escape from a dangerous politician who wants to marry her. A massively popular commercial entertainer known for its energy, romance, and iconic action sequences.

title: Thirumalai
themes: romance, rivalry, village life, comedy
summary: A fun-loving rowdy from Chennai falls in love with a girl from a rival family. A cheerful commercial entertainer filled with action, comedy, and romance.

title: Pudhupettai
themes: poverty, gang life, corruption, survival, political crime
summary: A slum boy escapes a traumatic home life and rises through the ranks of a political gang, only to find himself trapped in cycles of violence. A dark and masterfully crafted crime epic.

title: Kadhalil Sodhappuvadhu Eppadi
themes: modern dating, heartbreak, friendship, young love
summary: A young man seeks advice from his friend on how to win back his ex-girlfriend. A charming and relatable romantic comedy that captured the anxieties of modern urban romance.

title: Munbe Vaa
themes: love, sacrifice, social acceptance, devotion
summary: A devoted young man falls in love with a girl from a higher social class and must prove his worth to her family. A romantic film celebrated for its emotional depth and Dhanush's heartfelt performance.

title: Vaaranam Aayiram
themes: father-son bond, army, love, loss, growing up
summary: A soldier relives memories of his father through parallel timelines of their lives. An emotional epic that celebrates the timeless bond between a father and son through love, loss, and shared dreams.

title: Yuganam
themes: communal harmony, rural life, inter-faith relationships
summary: A quiet drama about communities and relationships in rural Tamil Nadu navigating social and communal tensions with dignity and compassion.

title: Oh My Kadavule
themes: marriage, second chances, destiny, friendship vs love
summary: A man unhappy in his arranged marriage is given a chance to relive his past and choose a different path. A charming romantic comedy-fantasy about fate, friendship, and discovering what truly makes you happy.

title: Kalathil Santhippom
themes: love in adversity, village life, family honor, devotion
summary: A simple love story set in rural Tamil Nadu about two young people separated by family and circumstances. A gentle romantic film celebrating rural life and the purity of unconditional love.

title: Monster
themes: serial killer, police chase, heroism, crime
summary: A charismatic police officer hunts a cunning serial killer in a fast-paced action thriller. A commercially designed entertainer driven by its star's charisma and kinetic action.

title: Kadaikutty Singam
themes: family bond, agriculture, sibling relationships, village life
summary: The eldest son of a farming family sacrifices his dreams to hold his siblings together. A warm and emotionally satisfying family drama about duty, sacrifice, and the ties that bind.

title: Nerkonda Paarvai
themes: consent, legal system, victim shaming, women's rights
summary: A lawyer defends three women accused of killing a man who tried to sexually assault them. A powerful courtroom drama that sparked important conversations about consent and victim shaming.

title: Valimai
themes: biker gang, police vs criminals, father-son conflict
summary: A sincere police officer takes on a dangerous biker gang responsible for a series of murders. A high-octane commercial action film with impressive vehicular action sequences.
